programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A showboating motorcyclist is confronted by a pickup driver in Las Vegas. A tow truck operator in Miami Beach is accused of stealing from an impounded vehicle. An SUV flips and rolls off an overpass when it's struck by a careening box truck in China. A disagreement over a late merge in Tennessee becomes potentially deadly.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A motorist brandishes a knife at a semi driver after they collide on an Albuquerque highway. Police in Ohio utilize multiple PIT maneuvers during a high-speed chase. An SUV driver attempts a multi-point turn while dangling off a steep drop in China. A man in Kentucky attempts to document an allegedly dangerous driver, who then pulls a firearm on him.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect panics and runs, the dog smells it instantly; one bad decision leads to a very fast ending.
